g.text: Legend: 🔵 Symmetric Path | 🟡 Asymmetric Path | 🟢 Efficient for ReLU | 🔴 High Dynamic Range
No negative values; asymmetric uses full range.
Zero-centered weights; symmetric is hardware optimal.
Highly skewed ranges; asymmetric reduces quantization error.

ul.li: Constraint: Requires zp subtraction in MACs
